fields.description: Allow RetailEdge to control whether POS/Sales Invoice posting date behavior is extended.
fields.label: Enable Posting Date Control

fields.description: Allows permitted users to set or preserve posting date on POS/Sales Invoice transactions when supported by ERPNext/POSNext.
fields.label: Allow POS Posting Date Override

fields.description: Roles allowed to override posting date when RetailEdge posting date control is enabled.
fields.label: Roles Allowed to Override Posting Date

fields.description: When enabled, selected roles will be restricted from seeing cost price, valuation, incoming rate, purchase rate, stock value, gross profit, and other cost-related values controlled by RetailEdge.
fields.label: Hide Cost Price for Selected Roles

fields.description: Enables RetailEdge audit intelligence for Sales Invoices and payments. V0.1A only creates the setting; audit functionality will be added in later phases.
fields.label: Enable Sales & Payment Audit

fields.description: Enables RetailEdge cashier expense capture and review workflow.
fields.label: Enable Cashier Expense Workflow

fields.description: Require receipt/evidence attachment before a cashier expense can be submitted.
fields.label: Require Attachment for Cashier Expense

fields.description: Reserved for a later phase. Keep disabled by default. Current cashier expense phases only provide posting readiness and preview; they do not create Journal Entries or Payment Entries.
fields.label: Enable Accounting Posting for Cashier Expenses

fields.description: Allows non-cancelled cashier expenses to be considered by RetailEdge variance reporting, even before ledger posting is implemented.
fields.label: Include Cashier Expenses in Variance Report

fields.description: When enabled, cashiers must have an open POS Opening Shift before recording expenses.
fields.label: Require Open POS Shift for Cashier Expense

fields.description: Allows permitted users to edit Expense Date. If disabled, Expense Date defaults to today and remains read-only.
fields.label: Allow Cashier Expense Date Editing

fields.description: When enabled, draft cashier expenses reduce available shift cash to prevent overspending before submission.
fields.label: Include Draft Cashier Expenses in Cash Check

fields.description: When enabled, rejected expenses still reduce shift cash because they may represent actual cash spent but rejected for review/accounting reasons.
fields.label: Include Rejected Cashier Expenses in Cash Check

fields.description: If disabled, a cash payment account must be resolved before saving a cashier expense.
fields.label: Allow Cashier Expense Without Cash Account

fields.description: Preferred accounting document type for a future cashier expense posting phase. Current behavior remains preview and readiness only.
fields.label: Cashier Expense Posting Document Type

fields.description: Reserved for a future posting mode if payable clearing is required. No accounting document is created in the current phase.
fields.label: Default Cashier Expense Payable Account

fields.description: Template used by posting readiness preview to show how a future accounting remark may look. No Journal Entry or Payment Entry is created in the current phase.
fields.label: Posting Remark Template
Include Draft Cashier Expenses in Daily Audit Readiness
Include Submitted Cashier Expenses in Daily Audit Readiness
Include Pending Ledger Cashier Expenses in Daily Audit Readiness

fields.description: Rejected expenses may still represent physical cash movement and should remain visible unless explicitly excluded.
fields.label: Include Rejected Cashier Expenses in Daily Audit Readiness
Exclude Cancelled Cashier Expenses from Daily Audit

fields.description: Enables the Daily Sales Audit foundation. This phase remains read-only and does not mutate invoices, payments, POS shifts, or accounting records.
fields.label: Enable Daily Sales Audit
Require POS Closing Shift for Daily Sales Audit

fields.description: Includes eligible cashier expenses in Daily Sales Audit preview calculations only. This does not modify POS variance totals.
fields.label: Include Cashier Expenses in Daily Sales Audit Preview
Include Rejected Cashier Expenses in Daily Sales Audit Preview
Daily Sales Audit Reviewer Roles
fields.options: RetailEdge Daily Sales Audit Reviewer Role

fields.label: Allow Self Review for Daily Sales Audit

fields.description: Allows RetailEdge to apply branch profile defaults to empty fields on draft documents.
fields.label: Enable Branch Default Application

fields.description: Reserved for controlled use. Do not apply accounts broadly unless document mapping is safe.
fields.label: Apply Default Accounts

fields.description: When enabled, RetailEdge will attempt to consume CoreEdge shared services where available.
fields.label: Enable CoreEdge Integration

fields.description: If enabled, RetailEdge customer portal features should require CoreEdge entitlement/access checks.
fields.label: Require CoreEdge for Portal Access

fields.description: Use CoreEdge payment/payment gateway services for invoice payment requests when CoreEdge is installed and available.
fields.label: Use CoreEdge Payment Requests

fields.description: Use CoreEdge notification services for RetailEdge alerts when available.
fields.label: Use CoreEdge Notifications

fields.description: Use CoreEdge active branch/session context when available.
fields.label: Use CoreEdge Branch Context

fields.description: Master switch for RetailEdge bank auto-match at the review layer only. It does not reconcile Bank Transactions, change Bank Transaction status, or create accounting entries.
fields.label: Enable Bank Auto-Match

fields.description: Creates RetailEdge Bank Transaction Match review records for strict exact matches only. It does not confirm them unless auto-confirm is separately enabled, and it does not reconcile Bank Transactions.
fields.label: Auto-Prepare Exact Bank Matches

fields.description: Confirms only strict exact RetailEdge review-layer matches. Keep disabled by default. It does not perform ERPNext bank reconciliation and does not create Payment Entries, Journal Entries, or GL Entries.
fields.label: Auto-Confirm Exact Bank Matches

fields.description: Minimum score required before RetailEdge can consider a suggestion for auto-match. Lower scores remain manual review.
fields.label: Minimum Auto-Match Score

fields.description: Requires strong or exact reference evidence before RetailEdge can auto-match a suggestion.
fields.label: Require Exact Reference for Auto-Match

fields.description: Blocks auto-match when the expected bank account does not align with the Bank Transaction account.
fields.label: Require Same Bank Account for Auto-Match

fields.description: Blocks auto-match when branch context does not align, where RetailEdge branch is available.
fields.label: Require Same Branch for Auto-Match

fields.description: Allows strict exact submitted Payment Entry matches under all other RetailEdge safety gates. It does not reconcile the Bank Transaction.
fields.label: Allow Auto-Match for Payment Entry

fields.description: Conservative option. Sales Invoice auto-match confirms RetailEdge review only. It does not mark the invoice paid and does not create a Payment Entry.
fields.label: Allow Auto-Match for Sales Invoice

fields.description: Blocks auto-match when duplicate candidate risk exists in the current RetailEdge view or queue.
fields.label: Require No Duplicate Candidate for Auto-Match

fields.description: Blocks auto-match when an active RetailEdge Bank Match Review record already exists for the same suggestion.
fields.label: Require No Active Review for Auto-Match
